logic_model.impact: ENERGY STORAGE PROVIDES LOWER COST, NEAR TERM, SCALEABLE CONTRIBUTION TO AUSTRALIA'S SHARED LOW CARBON ENERGY PORTFOLIO, INDUSTRY DEVELOPMENT, COMMUNITY LIVEABILITY & WELLBEING
logic_model.dimension: Filtered & licensed through the convergence of investment & participation, regulation, cultural and social values, place experiences, traditions and behaviours
logic_model.challenge: Australia pursuing low carbon energy generation in combination with increased on-shore value add production, digitisation and improved livelihoods

outcomes.description: Reduced net greenhouse gas emissions through maximum use of existing infrastructure and improved rehabilitation of legacy mining environmental locations
Sustainable, equitable, reduced cost/cost effective, low carbon power delivery to industry, services and households
Well located and productive storage, knowledge, technologies and economic contribution
Strong corporate entities, local and sectoral employment and new, sustainable business opportunities from non carbon energy production, driving a just transition.
